backgroundStory.label: Background story
backgroundStory.headline: Built from repetition
backgroundStory.body: Started as a content creator in a POD company making videos, managing content, uploading products manually every single day. About a month in, I got fed up with the repetition and taught myself how to use n8n and Make. Built my first automation to upload products to Shopify automatically. Now I turn business bottlenecks into AI-powered workflows that run themselves.
